CREATE TABLE test_table (value Int8, value_string String);
SELECT reinterpret(value, 'UInt8') AS int_to_uint FROM test_table;
SELECT reinterpret(value, 'Float32') AS int_to_float FROM test_table;
SELECT reinterpret(value_string, 'UInt32') AS string_to_int FROM test_table;
SELECT reinterpret(value, 'Float64') AS int_to_double FROM test_table WHERE value < 100;
SELECT reinterpret(reinterpret(value, 'UInt8'), 'Int8') AS nested_reinterpret FROM test_table;
WITH (SELECT reinterpret(value, 'UInt8') FROM test_table WHERE value < 0) AS subquery SELECT sum(subquery) AS invalid_reinterpret_sum;
CREATE TABLE another_table (value1 Int32, value2 String);
SELECT reinterpret(value1, 'Float64') + reinterpret(value2, 'UInt32') AS complex_operation FROM another_table;
SELECT t1.value, reinterpret(t1.value, 'Float32') FROM test_table t1 JOIN another_table t2 ON reinterpret(t2.value1, 'UInt32') = t1.value;
